Name: Wintweak2 Database
Author: builtbybel
Description: The built-in registry tweak database powering the Tweaker page. Update to get the latest tweaks.

Name: Winappx Database
Author: builtbybel
Description: The built-in bloatware app database powering the Debloat page. Update to get the latest app list.

Name: Winget2 Database
Author: builtbybel
Description: The built-in app installer database powering the App Updates page. Update to get the latest package list.

Name: WinUtil Tweaks
Author: ChrisTitusTech
Description: Registry tweaks collection covering Taskbar, Explorer, Privacy, Performance, Accessibility and more. Based on ChrisTitusTech WinUtil.

Name: Chris Titus App
Author: ChrisTitusTech
Description: Launches Chris Titus Tech's all-in-one Windows utility for installing programs, applying tweaks, fixes and updates.

Name: Win11Debloat
Author: Raphire
Description: Removes bloatware and optimizes Windows 11 using Raphire's Win11Debloat script.

Name: Clear Icon Cache
Author: builtbybel
Description: Clears the Windows icon cache to fix incorrectly displayed or missing icons. Restarts Explorer automatically.

Name: Create Restore Point
Author: builtbybel
Description: Creates a Windows System Restore Point before making changes. Bypasses the 24h frequency limit automatically.

Name: Restart Explorer
Author: builtbybel
Description: Restarts Windows Explorer to apply UI changes without rebooting.
